turns.user_message: I tried to relax today but it just didn't work. I feel wound up and on edge for no real reason.
This feeling keeps coming back no matter what I do to distract myself. My chest gets tight and my thoughts just spin.
I feel like I'm constantly braced for something awful to happen. It's exhausting and I can't find a moment of peace.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
